data.body: Investigation complete. Root cause: tests 18/19 (test_complete_comment_written_on_success, test_complete_comment_written_on_failure) were RED tests for unimplemented WORKTREE_TRACKING:complete functionality. harvest-worktree.sh lacked --ticket-id parameter and _DSO_SHIM resolution. Commit 19523fb4 ('feat(worktree-tracking): implement WORKTREE_TRACKING lifecycle signals') implemented both features with proper PATH fallback for test stub injection. All 337 test files + 11 merge-to-main tests now pass in batch mode. The test-batched.sh runner shows PASSED 39 FAILED 0 for harvest-worktree tests in isolation and PASSED 66 FAILED 0 for all 11 merge-to-main test files.
